response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack and distributed-systems experience, but the role requires an executive CTO with 5+ years of senior technical leadership, proven scaling of engineering orgs from 10 to 30+, and production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech. The resume shows no people-management or executive leadership history, no demonstrated multi-agent production AI work, and only tangential fintech exposure. The gap between senior developer and CTO at a venture-backed scale-up is substantial.
strengths: Deep backend and distributed-systems experience including high-throughput microservices at Sociomantic
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership or scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems experience
Minimal fintech-infrastructure exposure (credit risk, working capital, regulated environments)

key_factors.factor: No production multi-agent AI systems experience
